name: chain_gov_contract_the_contractor_shall_prov
method: [GOV CONTRACT] THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE FUNCTIONAL RESOURCES TO SUPPORT THE PRINTING AND GRAPHIC DESIGN SERVICES. (deadline: 2027-02-14)
